name: part_003
file: tmp_【Sneak Peak】hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】 [GvDwA90OOuU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Vestia Zeta hold an MC segment during the Hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE 'Chromatic Future'. They discuss the thrill of the concert, the meaning behind the title 'Chromatic Future', and encourage fans to use the event hashtag on social media. They also share their initial reactions to the announcement of an Indonesian live show and show off their new 3D models with some playful camera-hogging.

subtitles.original: Segitu ya? Ya udahlah, ya udah.

subtitles.english: So guys, for those who don't know, "Chromatic Future" means a colorful future.

subtitles.original: Jadi karena Hololive Indonesia kan sudah 5 tahun nih, kita sama-sama dari hari satu sampai sekarang.
subtitles.english: So because Hololive Indonesia has been around for 5 years now, we've been together from day one until now.
